- `transform(transformFn: string): this` — Apply transform modifier.

Note: function is provided as raw code string e.g. `(val) => transformedVal`.
- `is<K>(type: K): this is TypeKindOf<K>` — 
- `modify(baseText: string): string` — Apply all shared modifiers to the base schema string.
This method is called by text() and applies modifiers in a stable order.
- `text(): string` — Unwrap and return the final Zod code string.
This orchestrates the template method pattern: text() = modify(base())
- `toString(): string` — Returns a string representation of an object.

### TupleBuilder

Fluent TupleBuilder: represents z.tuple() schema.
Accepts an array of schemas representing tuple items.

```ts
constructor(version: "v3" | "v4", items: Builder<ZodType<unknown, unknown, $ZodTypeInternals<unknown, unknown>>, "string" | "number" | "bigint" | "boolean" | "symbol" | "undefined" | "object" | "function" | "array" | "null" | "any" | "default" | "enum" | "map" | "nullable" | "int" | "void" | "never" | "unknown" | "date" | "record" | "file" | "tuple" | "union" | "intersection" | "set" | "literal" | "optional" | "nonoptional" | "success" | "transform" | "prefault" | "catch" | "nan" | "pipe" | "readonly" | "template_literal" | "promise" | "lazy" | "custom">[]): TupleBuilder
```

**Properties:**
- `typeKind: "tuple"` — Parser type discriminator (e.g. `'string'`, `'object'`, `'anyOf'`).
Set by the parser that creates this builder.
- `_params: [items: Builder<ZodType<unknown, unknown, $ZodTypeInternals<unknown, unknown>>, "string" | "number" | "bigint" | "boolean" | "symbol" | "undefined" | "object" | "function" | "array" | "null" | "any" | "default" | "enum" | "map" | "nullable" | "int" | "void" | "never" | "unknown" | "date" | "record" | "file" | "tuple" | "union" | "intersection" | "set" | "literal" | "optional" | "nonoptional" | "success" | "transform" | "prefault" | "catch" | "nan" | "pipe" | "readonly" | "template_literal" | "promise" | "lazy" | "custom">[]]` — 
- `_optional: boolean` — 
- `_nullable: boolean` — 
- `_readonly: boolean` — 
- `_defaultValue: unknown` — 
- `_describeText: string` — 
- `_brandText: string` — 
- `_fallbackText: unknown` — 
- `_refineFn: string` — 
- `_refineMessage: string` — 
- `_superRefineFns: string[]` — 
- `_metaData: Record<string, unknown>` — 
- `_transformFn: string` — 
- `_version: "v3" | "v4"` — 

**Methods:**
- `base(): string` — Compute the type-specific base schema string.

This is the core abstract method in the template method pattern.
Subclasses must implement this to provide their type-specific schema string
(e.g., "z.string()", "z.number()", "z.object({...})").

The base schema string returned by this method will then have shared modifiers
applied via the `modify()` method when `text()` is called.
- `isV4(): boolean` — Check if targeting Zod v4.
- `isV3(): boolean` — Check if targeting Zod v3.
- `serializeParams(): string` — Serialize params to a string representation for code generation.
Handles objects, strings, primitives, and undefined.
- `optional(): this` — Apply optional constraint.
- `required(): this` — 
- `nullable(): this` — Apply nullable constraint.
- `default(value: unknown): this` — Apply default value.
- `describe(description: string): this` — Apply describe modifier.
- `brand(brand: string): this` — Apply brand modifier.
- `readonly(): this` — Apply readonly modifier.
- `catch(fallback: unknown): this` — Apply catch modifier.
- `refine(refineFn: string, message?: string): this` — Apply refine modifier.

Note: function is provided as raw code string e.g. `(val) => val > 0`.
- `superRefine(superRefineFn: string): this` — Apply superRefine modifier.

Note: function is provided as raw code string e.g. `(val, ctx) => { ... }`.
- `meta(metadata: Record<string, unknown>): this` — Apply meta modifier.
- `transform(transformFn: string): this` — Apply transform modifier.

Note: function is provided as raw code string e.g. `(val) => transformedVal`.
- `is<K>(type: K): this is TypeKindOf<K>` — 
- `modify(baseText: string): string` — Apply all shared modifiers to the base schema string.
This method is called by text() and applies modifiers in a stable order.
- `text(): string` — Unwrap and return the final Zod code string.
This orchestrates the template method pattern: text() = modify(base())
- `toString(): string` — Returns a string representation of an object.

### RecordBuilder

Fluent RecordBuilder: represents z.record() schema.
Accepts key and value schemas.

KEY SCHEMA REQUIREMENT - Version Differences:
- Zod v3: z.record(valueSchema) with implicit string keys, or z.record(keySchema, valueSchema)
- Zod v4: z.record(keySchema, valueSchema) REQUIRED - single argument form not allowed

Implementation: RecordBuilder ALWAYS uses the two-argument form z.record(keySchema, valueSchema)
for v3/v4 compatibility. This is the safest and most explicit approach.

Typically keySchema is z.string() since JSON object keys are strings.
See RECORD-KEY-SCHEMA-NOTES.md for detailed discussion.

```ts
constructor(version: "v3" | "v4", keySchema: Builder, valueSchema: Builder): RecordBuilder
```

**Properties:**
- `typeKind: "record"` — Parser type discriminator (e.g. `'string'`, `'object'`, `'anyOf'`).
Set by the parser that creates this builder.
- `_params: [keySchema: Builder<ZodType<unknown, unknown, $ZodTypeInternals<unknown, unknown>>, "string" | "number" | "bigint" | "boolean" | "symbol" | "undefined" | "object" | "function" | "array" | "null" | "any" | "default" | "enum" | "map" | "nullable" | "int" | "void" | "never" | "unknown" | "date" | "record" | "file" | "tuple" | "union" | "intersection" | "set" | "literal" | "optional" | "nonoptional" | "success" | "transform" | "prefault" | "catch" | "nan" | "pipe" | "readonly" | "template_literal" | "promise" | "lazy" | "custom">, valueSchema: Builder<ZodType<unknown, unknown, $ZodTypeInternals<unknown, unknown>>, "string" | "number" | "bigint" | "boolean" | "symbol" | "undefined" | "object" | "function" | "array" | "null" | "any" | "default" | "enum" | "map" | "nullable" | "int" | "void" | "never" | "unknown" | "date" | "record" | "file" | "tuple" | "union" | "intersection" | "set" | "literal" | "optional" | "nonoptional" | "success" | "transform" | "prefault" | "catch" | "nan" | "pipe" | "readonly" | "template_literal" | "promise" | "lazy" | "custom">]` — 
- `_optional: boolean` — 
- `_nullable: boolean` — 
- `_readonly: boolean` — 
- `_defaultValue: unknown` — 
- `_describeText: string` — 
- `_brandText: string` — 
- `_fallbackText: unknown` — 
- `_refineFn: string` — 
- `_refineMessage: string` — 
- `_superRefineFns: string[]` — 
- `_metaData: Record<string, unknown>` — 
- `_transformFn: string` — 
- `_version: "v3" | "v4"` — 

**Methods:**
- `base(): string` — Compute the type-specific base schema string.

This is the core abstract method in the template method pattern.
Subclasses must implement this to provide their type-specific schema string
(e.g., "z.string()", "z.number()", "z.object({...})").

The base schema string returned by this method will then have shared modifiers
applied via the `modify()` method when `text()` is called.
- `isV4(): boolean` — Check if targeting Zod v4.
- `isV3(): boolean` — Check if targeting Zod v3.
- `serializeParams(): string` — Serialize params to a string representation for code generation.
Handles objects, strings, primitives, and undefined.
- `optional(): this` — Apply optional constraint.
- `required(): this` — 
- `nullable(): this` — Apply nullable constraint.
- `default(value: unknown): this` — Apply default value.
- `describe(description: string): this` — Apply describe modifier.
- `brand(brand: string): this` — Apply brand modifier.
- `readonly(): this` — Apply readonly modifier.
- `catch(fallback: unknown): this` — Apply catch modifier.
- `refine(refineFn: string, message?: string): this` — Apply refine modifier.

Note: function is provided as raw code string e.g. `(val) => val > 0`.
- `superRefine(superRefineFn: string): this` — Apply superRefine modifier.

Note: function is provided as raw code string e.g. `(val, ctx) => { ... }`.
- `meta(metadata: Record<string, unknown>): this` — Apply meta modifier.
- `transform(transformFn: string): this` — Apply transform modifier.

Note: function is provided as raw code string e.g. `(val) => transformedVal`.
- `is<K>(type: K): this is TypeKindOf<K>` — 
- `modify(baseText: string): string` — Apply all shared modifiers to the base schema string.
This method is called by text() and applies modifiers in a stable order.
- `text(): string` — Unwrap and return the final Zod code string.
This orchestrates the template method pattern: text() = modify(base())
- `toString(): string` — Returns a string representation of an object.

### ReferenceBuilder

ReferenceBuilder represents a reference to an external schema in a multi-schema project.
It is used when a $ref points to another schema file and generates the appropriate
import and reference code.

This is a standalone class (not a ZodBuilder subclass) because references are
structural pointers, not Zod schema constructors — they don't map to a z.xxx() call.

```ts
constructor(targetImportName: string, targetExportName: string, importInfo: ImportInfo, options?: { isLazy?: boolean; isTypeOnly?: boolean; unknownFallback?: boolean }): ReferenceBuilder
```

**Properties:**
- `typeKind: "lazy"` — Parser type discriminator (e.g. `'string'`, `'object'`, `'anyOf'`).
Set by the parser that creates this builder.
- `targetImportName: string` — 
- `targetExportName: string` — 
- `importInfo: ImportInfo` — 
- `isLazy: boolean` — 
- `isTypeOnly: boolean` — 
- `unknownFallback: boolean` — 
- `shouldEmitImport: boolean` — 
- `_optional: boolean` — 
- `_nullable: boolean` — 
- `_readonly: boolean` — 
- `_defaultValue: unknown` — 
- `_describeText: string` — 
- `_brandText: string` — 
- `_fallbackText: unknown` — 
- `_refineFn: string` — 
- `_refineMessage: string` — 
- `_superRefineFns: string[]` — 
- `_metaData: Record<string, unknown>` — 
- `_transformFn: string` — 

**Methods:**
- `optional(): this` — Apply `.optional()` modifier to the generated schema.
- `nullable(): this` — Apply `.nullable()` modifier to the generated schema.
- `default(value: unknown): this` — Apply `.default(value)` modifier.
- `describe(description: string): this` — Apply `.describe(description)` modifier.
- `brand(brand: string): this` — Apply `.brand(brand)` modifier for nominal typing.
- `readonly(): this` — Apply `.readonly()` modifier to the generated schema.
- `catch(value: unknown): this` — Apply `.catch(fallback)` modifier for parse-failure recovery.
- `refine(refineFn: string, message?: string): this` — Apply `.refine(fn, message?)` constraint.
- `superRefine(superRefineFn: string): this` — Apply `.superRefine(fn)` constraint.
- `meta(metadata: Record<string, unknown>): this` — Apply `.meta(obj)` metadata (Zod v4+).
- `transform(transformFn: string): this` — Apply `.transform(fn)` mapping.
- `text(): string` — Emit the final Zod expression as a TypeScript code string.
- `getImportInfo(): ImportInfo | null` — 

### VoidBuilder

VoidBuilder: represents z.void()

```ts
constructor(version: "v3" | "v4", params: [params?: string | { error?: string | ((args: [issue: { input: unknown; code: "invalid_type"; expected: "string" | "number" | "bigint" | "boolean" | "symbol" | "undefined" | "object" | "function" | "array" | "null" | "map" | "int" | "void" | "never" | "date" | "record" | "file" | "tuple" | "set" | "nonoptional" | "nan" | { toString: any; charAt: any; charCodeAt: any; concat: any; indexOf: any; lastIndexOf: any; localeCompare: any; match: any; replace: any; search: any; slice: any; split: any; substring: any; toLowerCase: any; toLocaleLowerCase: any; toUpperCase: any; toLocaleUpperCase: any; trim: any; length: number; substr: any; valueOf: any; codePointAt: any; includes: any; endsWith: any; normalize: any; repeat: any; startsWith: any; anchor: any; big: any; blink: any; bold: any; fixed: any; fontcolor: any; fontsize: any; italics: any; link: any; small: any; strike: any; sub: any; sup: any; padStart: any; padEnd: any; trimEnd: any; trimStart: any; trimLeft: any; trimRight: any; matchAll: any; replaceAll: any; at: any; isWellFormed: any; toWellFormed: any; [iterator]: any; [key: number]: string }; path?: PropertyKey[]; message?: string; inst?: { _zod: { version: { major: ...; minor: ...; patch: ... }; def: { type: ...; error?: ...; checks?: ... }; run: any; parse: any; toJSONSchema?: (...) | (...) }; ~standard: { validate: (args: ...) => ...; version: 1; vendor: string; types?: (...) | (...) } } | { _zod: { def: { check: ...; error?: ...; abort?: ...; when?: ... }; issc?: (...) | (...); check: any; onattach: (...)[] } }; continue?: boolean; [key: string]: unknown }]) => string | { message: string } | null | undefined); message?: string }]): VoidBuilder
```

**Properties:**
- `typeKind: "void"` — Parser type discriminator (e.g. `'string'`, `'object'`, `'anyOf'`).
Set by the parser that creates this builder.
- `_params: [params?: string | { error?: string | ((args: [issue: { input: unknown; code: "invalid_type"; expected: "string" | "number" | "bigint" | "boolean" | "symbol" | "undefined" | "object" | "function" | "array" | "null" | "map" | "int" | "void" | "never" | "date" | "record" | "file" | "tuple" | "set" | "nonoptional" | "nan" | { toString: any; charAt: any; charCodeAt: any; concat: any; indexOf: any; lastIndexOf: any; localeCompare: any; match: any; replace: any; search: any; slice: any; split: any; substring: any; toLowerCase: any; toLocaleLowerCase: any; toUpperCase: any; toLocaleUpperCase: any; trim: any; length: number; substr: any; valueOf: any; codePointAt: any; includes: any; endsWith: any; normalize: any; repeat: any; startsWith: any; anchor: any; big: any; blink: any; bold: any; fixed: any; fontcolor: any; fontsize: any; italics: any; link: any; small: any; strike: any; sub: any; sup: any; padStart: any; padEnd: any; trimEnd: any; trimStart: any; trimLeft: any; trimRight: any; matchAll: any; replaceAll: any; at: any; isWellFormed: any; toWellFormed: any; [iterator]: any; [key: number]: string }; path?: PropertyKey[]; message?: string; inst?: { _zod: { version: ...; def: ...; run: any; parse: any; toJSONSchema?: ... }; ~standard: { validate: ...; version: ...; vendor: ...; types?: ... } } | { _zod: { def: ...; issc?: ...; check: any; onattach: ... } }; continue?: boolean; [key: string]: unknown }]) => string | { message: string } | null | undefined); message?: string }]` — 
- `_optional: boolean` — 
- `_nullable: boolean` — 
- `_readonly: boolean` — 
- `_defaultValue: unknown` — 
- `_describeText: string` — 
- `_brandText: string` — 
- `_fallbackText: unknown` — 
- `_refineFn: string` — 
- `_refineMessage: string` — 
- `_superRefineFns: string[]` — 
- `_metaData: Record<string, unknown>` — 
- `_transformFn: string` — 
- `_version: "v3" | "v4"` — 

**Methods:**
- `isV4(): boolean` — Check if targeting Zod v4.
- `isV3(): boolean` — Check if targeting Zod v3.
- `serializeParams(): string` — Serialize params to a string representation for code generation.
Handles objects, strings, primitives, and undefined.
- `optional(): this` — Apply optional constraint.
- `required(): this` — 
- `nullable(): this` — Apply nullable constraint.
- `default(value: unknown): this` — Apply default value.
- `describe(description: string): this` — Apply describe modifier.
- `brand(brand: string): this` — Apply brand modifier.
- `readonly(): this` — Apply readonly modifier.
- `catch(fallback: unknown): this` — Apply catch modifier.
- `refine(refineFn: string, message?: string): this` — Apply refine modifier.

Note: function is provided as raw code string e.g. `(val) => val > 0`.
- `superRefine(superRefineFn: string): this` — Apply superRefine modifier.

Note: function is provided as raw code string e.g. `(val, ctx) => { ... }`.
- `meta(metadata: Record<string, unknown>): this` — Apply meta modifier.
- `transform(transformFn: string): this` — Apply transform modifier.

Note: function is provided as raw code string e.g. `(val) => transformedVal`.
- `base(): string` — Compute the type-specific base schema string.

This is the core abstract method in the template method pattern.
Subclasses must implement this to provide their type-specific schema string
(e.g., "z.string()", "z.number()", "z.object({...})").

The base schema string returned by this method will then have shared modifiers
applied via the `modify()` method when `text()` is called.
- `is<K>(type: K): this is TypeKindOf<K>` — 
- `modify(baseText: string): string` — Apply all shared modifiers to the base schema string.
This method is called by text() and applies modifiers in a stable order.
- `text(): string` — Unwrap and return the final Zod code string.
This orchestrates the template method pattern: text() = modify(base())
- `toString(): string` — Returns a string representation of an object.

### UndefinedBuilder

UndefinedBuilder: represents z.undefined()

```ts
constructor(version: "v3" | "v4", params: [params?: string | { error?: string | ((args: [issue: { input: unknown; code: "invalid_type"; expected: "string" | "number" | "bigint" | "boolean" | "symbol" | "undefined" | "object" | "function" | "array" | "null" | "map" | "int" | "void" | "never" | "date" | "record" | "file" | "tuple" | "set" | "nonoptional" | "nan" | { toString: any; charAt: any; charCodeAt: any; concat: any; indexOf: any; lastIndexOf: any; localeCompare: any; match: any; replace: any; search: any; slice: any; split: any; substring: any; toLowerCase: any; toLocaleLowerCase: any; toUpperCase: any; toLocaleUpperCase: any; trim: any; length: number; substr: any; valueOf: any; codePointAt: any; includes: any; endsWith: any; normalize: any; repeat: any; startsWith: any; anchor: any; big: any; blink: any; bold: any; fixed: any; fontcolor: any; fontsize: any; italics: any; link: any; small: any; strike: any; sub: any; sup: any; padStart: any; padEnd: any; trimEnd: any; trimStart: any; trimLeft: any; trimRight: any; matchAll: any; replaceAll: any; at: any; isWellFormed: any; toWellFormed: any; [iterator]: any; [key: number]: string }; path?: PropertyKey[]; message?: string; inst?: { _zod: { version: { major: ...; minor: ...; patch: ... }; def: { type: ...; error?: ...; checks?: ... }; run: any; parse: any; toJSONSchema?: (...) | (...) }; ~standard: { validate: (args: ...) => ...; version: 1; vendor: string; types?: (...) | (...) } } | { _zod: { def: { check: ...; error?: ...; abort?: ...; when?: ... }; issc?: (...) | (...); check: any; onattach: (...)[] } }; continue?: boolean; [key: string]: unknown }]) => string | { message: string } | null | undefined); message?: string }]): UndefinedBuilder
```

**Properties:**
- `typeKind: "undefined"` — Parser type discriminator (e.g. `'string'`, `'object'`, `'anyOf'`).
Set by the parser that creates this builder.
- `_params: [params?: string | { error?: string | ((args: [issue: { input: unknown; code: "invalid_type"; expected: "string" | "number" | "bigint" | "boolean" | "symbol" | "undefined" | "object" | "function" | "array" | "null" | "map" | "int" | "void" | "never" | "date" | "record" | "file" | "tuple" | "set" | "nonoptional" | "nan" | { toString: any; charAt: any; charCodeAt: any; concat: any; indexOf: any; lastIndexOf: any; localeCompare: any; match: any; replace: any; search: any; slice: any; split: any; substring: any; toLowerCase: any; toLocaleLowerCase: any; toUpperCase: any; toLocaleUpperCase: any; trim: any; length: number; substr: any; valueOf: any; codePointAt: any; includes: any; endsWith: any; normalize: any; repeat: any; startsWith: any; anchor: any; big: any; blink: any; bold: any; fixed: any; fontcolor: any; fontsize: any; italics: any; link: any; small: any; strike: any; sub: any; sup: any; padStart: any; padEnd: any; trimEnd: any; trimStart: any; trimLeft: any; trimRight: any; matchAll: any; replaceAll: any; at: any; isWellFormed: any; toWellFormed: any; [iterator]: any; [key: number]: string }; path?: PropertyKey[]; message?: string; inst?: { _zod: { version: ...; def: ...; run: any; parse: any; toJSONSchema?: ... }; ~standard: { validate: ...; version: ...; vendor: ...; types?: ... } } | { _zod: { def: ...; issc?: ...; check: any; onattach: ... } }; continue?: boolean; [key: string]: unknown }]) => string | { message: string } | null | undefined); message?: string }]` — 
- `_optional: boolean` — 
- `_nullable: boolean` — 
- `_readonly: boolean` — 
- `_defaultValue: unknown` — 
- `_describeText: string` — 
- `_brandText: string` — 
- `_fallbackText: unknown` — 
- `_refineFn: string` — 
- `_refineMessage: string` — 
- `_superRefineFns: string[]` — 
- `_metaData: Record<string, unknown>` — 
- `_transformFn: string` — 
- `_version: "v3" | "v4"` — 

**Methods:**
- `isV4(): boolean` — Check if targeting Zod v4.
- `isV3(): boolean` — Check if targeting Zod v3.
- `serializeParams(): string` — Serialize params to a string representation for code generation.
Handles objects, strings, primitives, and undefined.
- `optional(): this` — Apply optional constraint.
- `required(): this` — 
- `nullable(): this` — Apply nullable constraint.
- `default(value: unknown): this` — Apply default value.
- `describe(description: string): this` — Apply describe modifier.
- `brand(brand: string): this` — Apply brand modifier.
- `readonly(): this` — Apply readonly modifier.
- `catch(fallback: unknown): this` — Apply catch modifier.
- `refine(refineFn: string, message?: string): this` — Apply refine modifier.

Note: function is provided as raw code string e.g. `(val) => val > 0`.
- `superRefine(superRefineFn: string): this` — Apply superRefine modifier.

Note: function is provided as raw code string e.g. `(val, ctx) => { ... }`.
- `meta(metadata: Record<string, unknown>): this` — Apply meta modifier.
- `transform(transformFn: string): this` — Apply transform modifier.

Note: function is provided as raw code string e.g. `(val) => transformedVal`.
- `base(): string` — Compute the type-specific base schema string.

This is the core abstract method in the template method pattern.
Subclasses must implement this to provide their type-specific schema string
(e.g., "z.string()", "z.number()", "z.object({...})").

The base schema string returned by this method will then have shared modifiers
applied via the `modify()` method when `text()` is called.
- `is<K>(type: K): this is TypeKindOf<K>` — 
- `modify(baseText: string): string` — Apply all shared modifiers to the base schema string.
This method is called by text() and applies modifiers in a stable order.
- `text(): string` — Unwrap and return the final Zod code string.
This orchestrates the template method pattern: text() = modify(base())
- `toString(): string` — Returns a string representation of an object.

### DateBuilder

DateBuilder: represents z.date() with optional constraints

```ts
constructor(version: "v3" | "v4", params: [params?: string | { error?: string | ((args: [issue: { input: unknown; code: "invalid_type"; expected: "string" | "number" | "bigint" | "boolean" | "symbol" | "undefined" | "object" | "function" | "array" | "null" | "map" | "int" | "void" | "never" | "date" | "record" | "file" | "tuple" | "set" | "nonoptional" | "nan" | { toString: any; charAt: any; charCodeAt: any; concat: any; indexOf: any; lastIndexOf: any; localeCompare: any; match: any; replace: any; search: any; slice: any; split: any; substring: any; toLowerCase: any; toLocaleLowerCase: any; toUpperCase: any; toLocaleUpperCase: any; trim: any; length: number; substr: any; valueOf: any; codePointAt: any; includes: any; endsWith: any; normalize: any; repeat: any; startsWith: any; anchor: any; big: any; blink: any; bold: any; fixed: any; fontcolor: any; fontsize: any; italics: any; link: any; small: any; strike: any; sub: any; sup: any; padStart: any; padEnd: any; trimEnd: any; trimStart: any; trimLeft: any; trimRight: any; matchAll: any; replaceAll: any; at: any; isWellFormed: any; toWellFormed: any; [iterator]: any; [key: number]: string }; path?: PropertyKey[]; message?: string; inst?: { _zod: { version: { major: ...; minor: ...; patch: ... }; def: { type: ...; error?: ...; checks?: ... }; run: any; parse: any; toJSONSchema?: (...) | (...) }; ~standard: { validate: (args: ...) => ...; version: 1; vendor: string; types?: (...) | (...) } } | { _zod: { def: { check: ...; error?: ...; abort?: ...; when?: ... }; issc?: (...) | (...); check: any; onattach: (...)[] } }; continue?: boolean; [key: string]: unknown }]) => string | { message: string } | null | undefined); message?: string }]): DateBuilder
```

**Properties:**
- `typeKind: "date"` — Parser type discriminator (e.g. `'string'`, `'object'`, `'anyOf'`).
Set by the parser that creates this builder.
- `_min: { value: Date; params?: unknown }` — 
- `_max: { value: Date; params?: unknown }` — 
- `_params: [params?: string | { error?: string | ((args: [issue: { input: unknown; code: "invalid_type"; expected: "string" | "number" | "bigint" | "boolean" | "symbol" | "undefined" | "object" | "function" | "array" | "null" | "map" | "int" | "void" | "never" | "date" | "record" | "file" | "tuple" | "set" | "nonoptional" | "nan" | { toString: any; charAt: any; charCodeAt: any; concat: any; indexOf: any; lastIndexOf: any; localeCompare: any; match: any; replace: any; search: any; slice: any; split: any; substring: any; toLowerCase: any; toLocaleLowerCase: any; toUpperCase: any; toLocaleUpperCase: any; trim: any; length: number; substr: any; valueOf: any; codePointAt: any; includes: any; endsWith: any; normalize: any; repeat: any; startsWith: any; anchor: any; big: any; blink: any; bold: any; fixed: any; fontcolor: any; fontsize: any; italics: any; link: any; small: any; strike: any; sub: any; sup: any; padStart: any; padEnd: any; trimEnd: any; trimStart: any; trimLeft: any; trimRight: any; matchAll: any; replaceAll: any; at: any; isWellFormed: any; toWellFormed: any; [iterator]: any; [key: number]: string }; path?: PropertyKey[]; message?: string; inst?: { _zod: { version: ...; def: ...; run: any; parse: any; toJSONSchema?: ... }; ~standard: { validate: ...; version: ...; vendor: ...; types?: ... } } | { _zod: { def: ...; issc?: ...; check: any; onattach: ... } }; continue?: boolean; [key: string]: unknown }]) => string | { message: string } | null | undefined); message?: string }]` — 
- `_optional: boolean` — 
- `_nullable: boolean` — 
- `_readonly: boolean` — 
- `_defaultValue: unknown` — 
- `_describeText: string` — 
- `_brandText: string` — 
- `_fallbackText: unknown` — 
- `_refineFn: string` — 
- `_refineMessage: string` — 
- `_superRefineFns: string[]` — 
- `_metaData: Record<string, unknown>` — 
- `_transformFn: string` — 
- `_version: "v3" | "v4"` — 

**Methods:**
- `min(value: Date, params?: unknown): this` — Apply minimum date constraint.
- `max(value: Date, params?: unknown): this` — Apply maximum date constraint.
- `base(): string` — Compute the type-specific base schema string.

This is the core abstract method in the template method pattern.
Subclasses must implement this to provide their type-specific schema string
(e.g., "z.string()", "z.number()", "z.object({...})").

The base schema string returned by this method will then have shared modifiers
applied via the `modify()` method when `text()` is called.
- `modify(baseText: string): string` — Apply all shared modifiers to the base schema string.
This method is called by text() and applies modifiers in a stable order.
- `isV4(): boolean` — Check if targeting Zod v4.
- `isV3(): boolean` — Check if targeting Zod v3.
- `serializeParams(): string` — Serialize params to a string representation for code generation.
Handles objects, strings, primitives, and undefined.
- `optional(): this` — Apply optional constraint.
- `required(): this` — 
- `nullable(): this` — Apply nullable constraint.
- `default(value: unknown): this` — Apply default value.
- `describe(description: string): this` — Apply describe modifier.
- `brand(brand: string): this` — Apply brand modifier.
- `readonly(): this` — Apply readonly modifier.
- `catch(fallback: unknown): this` — Apply catch modifier.
- `refine(refineFn: string, message?: string): this` — Apply refine modifier.

Note: function is provided as raw code string e.g. `(val) => val > 0`.
- `superRefine(superRefineFn: string): this` — Apply superRefine modifier.

Note: function is provided as raw code string e.g. `(val, ctx) => { ... }`.
- `meta(metadata: Record<string, unknown>): this` — Apply meta modifier.
- `transform(transformFn: string): this` — Apply transform modifier.

Note: function is provided as raw code string e.g. `(val) => transformedVal`.
- `is<K>(type: K): this is TypeKindOf<K>` — 
- `text(): string` — Unwrap and return the final Zod code string.
This orchestrates the template method pattern: text() = modify(base())
- `toString(): string` — Returns a string representation of an object.

### BigIntBuilder

BigIntBuilder: represents z.bigint() with optional constraints

```ts
constructor(version: "v3" | "v4", params: [params?: string | { coerce?: boolean; error?: string | ((args: [issue: { input: unknown; code: "invalid_type"; expected: "string" | "number" | "bigint" | "boolean" | "symbol" | "undefined" | "object" | "function" | "array" | "null" | "map" | "int" | "void" | "never" | "date" | "record" | "file" | "tuple" | "set" | "nonoptional" | "nan" | { toString: any; charAt: any; charCodeAt: any; concat: any; indexOf: any; lastIndexOf: any; localeCompare: any; match: any; replace: any; search: any; slice: any; split: any; substring: any; toLowerCase: any; toLocaleLowerCase: any; toUpperCase: any; toLocaleUpperCase: any; trim: any; length: number; substr: any; valueOf: any; codePointAt: any; includes: any; endsWith: any; normalize: any; repeat: any; startsWith: any; anchor: any; big: any; blink: any; bold: any; fixed: any; fontcolor: any; fontsize: any; italics: any; link: any; small: any; strike: any; sub: any; sup: any; padStart: any; padEnd: any; trimEnd: any; trimStart: any; trimLeft: any; trimRight: any; matchAll: any; replaceAll: any; at: any; isWellFormed: any; toWellFormed: any; [iterator]: any; [key: number]: string }; path?: PropertyKey[]; message?: string; inst?: { _zod: { version: { major: ...; minor: ...; patch: ... }; def: { type: ...; error?: ...; checks?: ... }; run: any; parse: any; toJSONSchema?: (...) | (...) }; ~standard: { validate: (args: ...) => ...; version: 1; vendor: string; types?: (...) | (...) } } | { _zod: { def: { check: ...; error?: ...; abort?: ...; when?: ... }; issc?: (...) | (...); check: any; onattach: (...)[] } }; continue?: boolean; [key: string]: unknown }]) => string | { message: string } | null | undefined); message?: string }]): BigIntBuilder
```

**Properties:**
- `_min: { value: bigint; exclusive: boolean; params?: unknown }` — 
- `_max: { value: bigint; exclusive: boolean; params?: unknown }` — 
- `_multipleOf: { value: bigint; params?: unknown }` — 
- `typeKind: "bigint"` — Parser type discriminator (e.g. `'string'`, `'object'`, `'anyOf'`).
Set by the parser that creates this builder.
- `_params: [params?: string | { coerce?: boolean; error?: string | ((args: [issue: { input: unknown; code: "invalid_type"; expected: "string" | "number" | "bigint" | "boolean" | "symbol" | "undefined" | "object" | "function" | "array" | "null" | "map" | "int" | "void" | "never" | "date" | "record" | "file" | "tuple" | "set" | "nonoptional" | "nan" | { toString: any; charAt: any; charCodeAt: any; concat: any; indexOf: any; lastIndexOf: any; localeCompare: any; match: any; replace: any; search: any; slice: any; split: any; substring: any; toLowerCase: any; toLocaleLowerCase: any; toUpperCase: any; toLocaleUpperCase: any; trim: any; length: number; substr: any; valueOf: any; codePointAt: any; includes: any; endsWith: any; normalize: any; repeat: any; startsWith: any; anchor: any; big: any; blink: any; bold: any; fixed: any; fontcolor: any; fontsize: any; italics: any; link: any; small: any; strike: any; sub: any; sup: any; padStart: any; padEnd: any; trimEnd: any; trimStart: any; trimLeft: any; trimRight: any; matchAll: any; replaceAll: any; at: any; isWellFormed: any; toWellFormed: any; [iterator]: any; [key: number]: string }; path?: PropertyKey[]; message?: string; inst?: { _zod: { version: ...; def: ...; run: any; parse: any; toJSONSchema?: ... }; ~standard: { validate: ...; version: ...; vendor: ...; types?: ... } } | { _zod: { def: ...; issc?: ...; check: any; onattach: ... } }; continue?: boolean; [key: string]: unknown }]) => string | { message: string } | null | undefined); message?: string }]` — 
- `_optional: boolean` — 
- `_nullable: boolean` — 
- `_readonly: boolean` — 
- `_defaultValue: unknown` — 
- `_describeText: string` — 
- `_brandText: string` — 
- `_fallbackText: unknown` — 
- `_refineFn: string` — 
- `_refineMessage: string` — 
- `_superRefineFns: string[]` — 
- `_metaData: Record<string, unknown>` — 
- `_transformFn: string` — 
- `_version: "v3" | "v4"` — 

**Methods:**
- `min(value: bigint, exclusiveOrParams?: unknown, maybeParams?: unknown): this` — Apply minimum constraint (gte by default).
- `max(value: bigint, exclusiveOrParams?: unknown, maybeParams?: unknown): this` — Apply maximum constraint (lte by default).
- `multipleOf(value: bigint, params?: unknown): this` — Apply multipleOf constraint.
- `base(): string` — Compute the type-specific base schema string.

This is the core abstract method in the template method pattern.
Subclasses must implement this to provide their type-specific schema string
(e.g., "z.string()", "z.number()", "z.object({...})").

The base schema string returned by this method will then have shared modifiers
applied via the `modify()` method when `text()` is called.
- `modify(baseText: string): string` — Apply all shared modifiers to the base schema string.
This method is called by text() and applies modifiers in a stable order.
- `isV4(): boolean` — Check if targeting Zod v4.
- `isV3(): boolean` — Check if targeting Zod v3.
- `serializeParams(): string` — Serialize params to a string representation for code generation.
Handles objects, strings, primitives, and undefined.
- `optional(): this` — Apply optional constraint.
- `required(): this` — 
- `nullable(): this` — Apply nullable constraint.
- `default(value: unknown): this` — Apply default value.
- `describe(description: string): this` — Apply describe modifier.
- `brand(brand: string): this` — Apply brand modifier.
- `readonly(): this` — Apply readonly modifier.
- `catch(fallback: unknown): this` — Apply catch modifier.
- `refine(refineFn: string, message?: string): this` — Apply refine modifier.

Note: function is provided as raw code string e.g. `(val) => val > 0`.
- `superRefine(superRefineFn: string): this` — Apply superRefine modifier.

Note: function is provided as raw code string e.g. `(val, ctx) => { ... }`.
- `meta(metadata: Record<string, unknown>): this` — Apply meta modifier.
- `transform(transformFn: string): this` — Apply transform modifier.

Note: function is provided as raw code string e.g. `(val) => transformedVal`.
- `is<K>(type: K): this is TypeKindOf<K>` — 
- `text(): string` — Unwrap and return the final Zod code string.
This orchestrates the template method pattern: text() = modify(base())
- `toString(): string` — Returns a string representation of an object.

### SymbolBuilder

SymbolBuilder: represents z.symbol()

```ts
constructor(version: "v3" | "v4", params: [params?: string | { error?: string | ((args: [issue: { input: unknown; code: "invalid_type"; expected: "string" | "number" | "bigint" | "boolean" | "symbol" | "undefined" | "object" | "function" | "array" | "null" | "map" | "int" | "void" | "never" | "date" | "record" | "file" | "tuple" | "set" | "nonoptional" | "nan" | { toString: any; charAt: any; charCodeAt: any; concat: any; indexOf: any; lastIndexOf: any; localeCompare: any; match: any; replace: any; search: any; slice: any; split: any; substring: any; toLowerCase: any; toLocaleLowerCase: any; toUpperCase: any; toLocaleUpperCase: any; trim: any; length: number; substr: any; valueOf: any; codePointAt: any; includes: any; endsWith: any; normalize: any; repeat: any; startsWith: any; anchor: any; big: any; blink: any; bold: any; fixed: any; fontcolor: any; fontsize: any; italics: any; link: any; small: any; strike: any; sub: any; sup: any; padStart: any; padEnd: any; trimEnd: any; trimStart: any; trimLeft: any; trimRight: any; matchAll: any; replaceAll: any; at: any; isWellFormed: any; toWellFormed: any; [iterator]: any; [key: number]: string }; path?: PropertyKey[]; message?: string; inst?: { _zod: { version: { major: ...; minor: ...; patch: ... }; def: { type: ...; error?: ...; checks?: ... }; run: any; parse: any; toJSONSchema?: (...) | (...) }; ~standard: { validate: (args: ...) => ...; version: 1; vendor: string; types?: (...) | (...) } } | { _zod: { def: { check: ...; error?: ...; abort?: ...; when?: ... }; issc?: (...) | (...); check: any; onattach: (...)[] } }; continue?: boolean; [key: string]: unknown }]) => string | { message: string } | null | undefined); message?: string }]): SymbolBuilder
```

### NaNBuilder

NaNBuilder: represents z.nan()

```ts
constructor(version: "v3" | "v4", params: [params?: string | { error?: string | ((args: [issue: { input: unknown; code: "invalid_type"; expected: "string" | "number" | "bigint" | "boolean" | "symbol" | "undefined" | "object" | "function" | "array" | "null" | "map" | "int" | "void" | "never" | "date" | "record" | "file" | "tuple" | "set" | "nonoptional" | "nan" | { toString: any; charAt: any; charCodeAt: any; concat: any; indexOf: any; lastIndexOf: any; localeCompare: any; match: any; replace: any; search: any; slice: any; split: any; substring: any; toLowerCase: any; toLocaleLowerCase: any; toUpperCase: any; toLocaleUpperCase: any; trim: any; length: number; substr: any; valueOf: any; codePointAt: any; includes: any; endsWith: any; normalize: any; repeat: any; startsWith: any; anchor: any; big: any; blink: any; bold: any; fixed: any; fontcolor: any; fontsize: any; italics: any; link: any; small: any; strike: any; sub: any; sup: any; padStart: any; padEnd: any; trimEnd: any; trimStart: any; trimLeft: any; trimRight: any; matchAll: any; replaceAll: any; at: any; isWellFormed: any; toWellFormed: any; [iterator]: any; [key: number]: string }; path?: PropertyKey[]; message?: string; inst?: { _zod: { version: { major: ...; minor: ...; patch: ... }; def: { type: ...; error?: ...; checks?: ... }; run: any; parse: any; toJSONSchema?: (...) | (...) }; ~standard: { validate: (args: ...) => ...; version: 1; vendor: string; types?: (...) | (...) } } | { _zod: { def: { check: ...; error?: ...; abort?: ...; when?: ... }; issc?: (...) | (...); check: any; onattach: (...)[] } }; continue?: boolean; [key: string]: unknown }]) => string | { message: string } | null | undefined); message?: string }]): NaNBuilder
```

### SetBuilder

SetBuilder: represents z.set() with optional constraints

```ts
constructor(version: "v3" | "v4", itemSchema: Builder): SetBuilder
```

**Properties:**
- `typeKind: "set"` — Parser type discriminator (e.g. `'string'`, `'object'`, `'anyOf'`).
Set by the parser that creates this builder.
- `_itemSchema: Builder` — 
- `_min: { value: number; params?: unknown }` — 
- `_max: { value: number; params?: unknown }` — 
- `_size: { value: number; params?: unknown }` — 
- `_params: [itemSchema: Builder<ZodType<unknown, unknown, $ZodTypeInternals<unknown, unknown>>, "string" | "number" | "bigint" | "boolean" | "symbol" | "undefined" | "object" | "function" | "array" | "null" | "any" | "default" | "enum" | "map" | "nullable" | "int" | "void" | "never" | "unknown" | "date" | "record" | "file" | "tuple" | "union" | "intersection" | "set" | "literal" | "optional" | "nonoptional" | "success" | "transform" | "prefault" | "catch" | "nan" | "pipe" | "readonly" | "template_literal" | "promise" | "lazy" | "custom">]` — 
- `_optional: boolean` — 
- `_nullable: boolean` — 
- `_readonly: boolean` — 
- `_defaultValue: unknown` — 
- `_describeText: string` — 
- `_brandText: string` — 
- `_fallbackText: unknown` — 
- `_refineFn: string` — 
- `_refineMessage: string` — 
- `_superRefineFns: string[]` — 
- `_metaData: Record<string, unknown>` — 
- `_transformFn: string` — 
- `_version: "v3" | "v4"` — 

**Methods:**
- `min(value: number, params?: unknown): this` — Apply minimum size constraint.
- `max(value: number, params?: unknown): this` — Apply maximum size constraint.
- `size(value: number, params?: unknown): this` — Apply exact size constraint.
- `base(): string` — Compute the type-specific base schema string.

This is the core abstract method in the template method pattern.
Subclasses must implement this to provide their type-specific schema string
(e.g., "z.string()", "z.number()", "z.object({...})").

The base schema string returned by this method will then have shared modifiers
applied via the `modify()` method when `text()` is called.
- `modify(baseText: string): string` — Apply all shared modifiers to the base schema string.
This method is called by text() and applies modifiers in a stable order.
- `isV4(): boolean` — Check if targeting Zod v4.
- `isV3(): boolean` — Check if targeting Zod v3.
- `serializeParams(): string` — Serialize params to a string representation for code generation.
Handles objects, strings, primitives, and undefined.
- `optional(): this` — Apply optional constraint.
- `required(): this` — 
- `nullable(): this` — Apply nullable constraint.
- `default(value: unknown): this` — Apply default value.
- `describe(description: string): this` — Apply describe modifier.
- `brand(brand: string): this` — Apply brand modifier.
- `readonly(): this` — Apply readonly modifier.
- `catch(fallback: unknown): this` — Apply catch modifier.
- `refine(refineFn: string, message?: string): this` — Apply refine modifier.

Note: function is provided as raw code string e.g. `(val) => val > 0`.
- `superRefine(superRefineFn: string): this` — Apply superRefine modifier.

Note: function is provided as raw code string e.g. `(val, ctx) => { ... }`.
- `meta(metadata: Record<string, unknown>): this` — Apply meta modifier.
- `transform(transformFn: string): this` — Apply transform modifier.

Note: function is provided as raw code string e.g. `(val) => transformedVal`.
- `is<K>(type: K): this is TypeKindOf<K>` — 
- `text(): string` — Unwrap and return the final Zod code string.
This orchestrates the template method pattern: text() = modify(base())
- `toString(): string` — Returns a string representation of an object.

### MapBuilder

MapBuilder: represents z.map() with optional constraints

```ts
constructor(version: "v3" | "v4", keySchema: Builder, valueSchema: Builder): MapBuilder
```

**Properties:**
- `typeKind: "map"` — Parser type discriminator (e.g. `'string'`, `'object'`, `'anyOf'`).
Set by the parser that creates this builder.
- `_keySchema: Builder` — 
- `_valueSchema: Builder` — 
- `_min: { value: number; params?: unknown }` — 
- `_max: { value: number; params?: unknown }` — 
- `_size: { value: number; params?: unknown }` — 
- `_params: [keySchema: Builder<ZodType<unknown, unknown, $ZodTypeInternals<unknown, unknown>>, "string" | "number" | "bigint" | "boolean" | "symbol" | "undefined" | "object" | "function" | "array" | "null" | "any" | "default" | "enum" | "map" | "nullable" | "int" | "void" | "never" | "unknown" | "date" | "record" | "file" | "tuple" | "union" | "intersection" | "set" | "literal" | "optional" | "nonoptional" | "success" | "transform" | "prefault" | "catch" | "nan" | "pipe" | "readonly" | "template_literal" | "promise" | "lazy" | "custom">, valueSchema: Builder<ZodType<unknown, unknown, $ZodTypeInternals<unknown, unknown>>, "string" | "number" | "bigint" | "boolean" | "symbol" | "undefined" | "object" | "function" | "array" | "null" | "any" | "default" | "enum" | "map" | "nullable" | "int" | "void" | "never" | "unknown" | "date" | "record" | "file" | "tuple" | "union" | "intersection" | "set" | "literal" | "optional" | "nonoptional" | "success" | "transform" | "prefault" | "catch" | "nan" | "pipe" | "readonly" | "template_literal" | "promise" | "lazy" | "custom">]` — 
- `_optional: boolean` — 
- `_nullable: boolean` — 
- `_readonly: boolean` — 
- `_defaultValue: unknown` — 
- `_describeText: string` — 
- `_brandText: string` — 
- `_fallbackText: unknown` — 
- `_refineFn: string` — 
- `_refineMessage: string` — 
- `_superRefineFns: string[]` — 
- `_metaData: Record<string, unknown>` — 
- `_transformFn: string` — 
- `_version: "v3" | "v4"` — 

**Methods:**
- `min(value: number, params?: unknown): this` — Apply minimum size constraint.
- `max(value: number, params?: unknown): this` — Apply maximum size constraint.
- `size(value: number, params?: unknown): this` — Apply exact size constraint.
- `base(): string` — Compute the type-specific base schema string.

This is the core abstract method in the template method pattern.
Subclasses must implement this to provide their type-specific schema string
(e.g., "z.string()", "z.number()", "z.object({...})").

The base schema string returned by this method will then have shared modifiers
applied via the `modify()` method when `text()` is called.
- `modify(baseText: string): string` — Apply all shared modifiers to the base schema string.
This method is called by text() and applies modifiers in a stable order.
- `isV4(): boolean` — Check if targeting Zod v4.
- `isV3(): boolean` — Check if targeting Zod v3.
- `serializeParams(): string` — Serialize params to a string representation for code generation.
Handles objects, strings, primitives, and undefined.
- `optional(): this` — Apply optional constraint.
- `required(): this` — 
- `nullable(): this` — Apply nullable constraint.
- `default(value: unknown): this` — Apply default value.
- `describe(description: string): this` — Apply describe modifier.
- `brand(brand: string): this` — Apply brand modifier.
- `readonly(): this` — Apply readonly modifier.
- `catch(fallback: unknown): this` — Apply catch modifier.
- `refine(refineFn: string, message?: string): this` — Apply refine modifier.

Note: function is provided as raw code string e.g. `(val) => val > 0`.
- `superRefine(superRefineFn: string): this` — Apply superRefine modifier.

Note: function is provided as raw code string e.g. `(val, ctx) => { ... }`.
- `meta(metadata: Record<string, unknown>): this` — Apply meta modifier.
- `transform(transformFn: string): this` — Apply transform modifier.

Note: function is provided as raw code string e.g. `(val) => transformedVal`.
- `is<K>(type: K): this is TypeKindOf<K>` — 
- `text(): string` — Unwrap and return the final Zod code string.
This orchestrates the template method pattern: text() = modify(base())
- `toString(): string` — Returns a string representation of an object.

### CustomBuilder

CustomBuilder: represents z.custom() for custom validation

```ts
constructor(version: "v3" | "v4", validateFn?: string, params?: unknown): CustomBuilder
```

**Properties:**
- `typeKind: "custom"` — Parser type discriminator (e.g. `'string'`, `'object'`, `'anyOf'`).
Set by the parser that creates this builder.
- `_validateFn: string` — 
- `_params: [params?: unknown]` — 
- `_optional: boolean` — 
- `_nullable: boolean` — 
- `_readonly: boolean` — 
- `_defaultValue: unknown` — 
- `_describeText: string` — 
- `_brandText: string` — 
- `_fallbackText: unknown` — 
- `_refineFn: string` — 
- `_refineMessage: string` — 
- `_superRefineFns: string[]` — 
- `_metaData: Record<string, unknown>` — 
- `_transformFn: string` — 
- `_version: "v3" | "v4"` — 

**Methods:**
- `base(): string` — Compute the type-specific base schema string.

This is the core abstract method in the template method pattern.
Subclasses must implement this to provide their type-specific schema string
(e.g., "z.string()", "z.number()", "z.object({...})").

The base schema string returned by this method will then have shared modifiers
applied via the `modify()` method when `text()` is called.
- `isV4(): boolean` — Check if targeting Zod v4.
- `isV3(): boolean` — Check if targeting Zod v3.
- `serializeParams(): string` — Serialize params to a string representation for code generation.
Handles objects, strings, primitives, and undefined.
- `optional(): this` — Apply optional constraint.
- `required(): this` — 
- `nullable(): this` — Apply nullable constraint.
- `default(value: unknown): this` — Apply default value.
- `describe(description: string): this` — Apply describe modifier.
- `brand(brand: string): this` — Apply brand modifier.
- `readonly(): this` — Apply readonly modifier.
- `catch(fallback: unknown): this` — Apply catch modifier.
- `refine(refineFn: string, message?: string): this` — Apply refine modifier.

Note: function is provided as raw code string e.g. `(val) => val > 0`.
- `superRefine(superRefineFn: string): this` — Apply superRefine modifier.

Note: function is provided as raw code string e.g. `(val, ctx) => { ... }`.
- `meta(metadata: Record<string, unknown>): this` — Apply meta modifier.
- `transform(transformFn: string): this` — Apply transform modifier.

Note: function is provided as raw code string e.g. `(val) => transformedVal`.
- `is<K>(type: K): this is TypeKindOf<K>` — 
- `modify(baseText: string): string` — Apply all shared modifiers to the base schema string.
This method is called by text() and applies modifiers in a stable order.
- `text(): string` — Unwrap and return the final Zod code string.
This orchestrates the template method pattern: text() = modify(base())
- `toString(): string` — Returns a string representation of an object.

### PromiseBuilder

PromiseBuilder: represents z.promise(innerType)
Wraps an inner schema for async value validation

```ts
constructor(version: "v3" | "v4", innerSchema: Builder): PromiseBuilder
```

**Properties:**
- `typeKind: "promise"` — Parser type discriminator (e.g. `'string'`, `'object'`, `'anyOf'`).
Set by the parser that creates this builder.
- `_params: [innerSchema: Builder<ZodType<unknown, unknown, $ZodTypeInternals<unknown, unknown>>, "string" | "number" | "bigint" | "boolean" | "symbol" | "undefined" | "object" | "function" | "array" | "null" | "any" | "default" | "enum" | "map" | "nullable" | "int" | "void" | "never" | "unknown" | "date" | "record" | "file" | "tuple" | "union" | "intersection" | "set" | "literal" | "optional" | "nonoptional" | "success" | "transform" | "prefault" | "catch" | "nan" | "pipe" | "readonly" | "template_literal" | "promise" | "lazy" | "custom">]` —

- `_nullable: boolean` — 
- `_readonly: boolean` —

- `_brandText: string` — 
- `_fallbackText: unknown` — 
- `_refineFn: string` — 
- `_refineMessage: string` — 
- `_superRefineFns: string[]` — 
- `_metaData: Record<string, unknown>` — 
- `_transformFn: string` — 
- `_version: "v3" | "v4"` — 

**Methods:**
- `base(): string` — Compute the type-specific base schema string.

This is the core abstract method in the template method pattern.
Subclasses must implement this to provide their type-specific schema string
(e.g., "z.string()", "z.number()", "z.object({...})").

applied via the `modify()` method when `text()` is called.

- `required(): this` — 
- `nullable(): this` — Apply nullable constraint.

- `brand(brand: string): this` — Apply brand modifier.

### LazyBuilder

LazyBuilder: represents z.lazy(() => schema)
Enables recursive schema definitions

```ts
constructor(version: "v3" | "v4", input: Builder): LazyBuilder
```

**Properties:**
- `typeKind: "lazy"` — Parser type discriminator (e.g. `'string'`, `'object'`, `'anyOf'`).
Set by the parser that creates this builder.
- `_params: [input: Builder<ZodType<unknown, unknown, $ZodTypeInternals<unknown, unknown>>, "string" | "number" | "bigint" | "boolean" | "symbol" | "undefined" | "object" | "function" | "array" | "null" | "any" | "default" | "enum" | "map" | "nullable" | "int" | "void" | "never" | "unknown" | "date" | "record" | "file" | "tuple" | "union" | "intersection" | "set" | "literal" | "optional" | "nonoptional" | "success" | "transform" | "prefault" | "catch" | "nan" | "pipe" | "readonly" | "template_literal" | "promise" | "lazy" | "custom">]` —

- `_refineMessage: string` — 
- `_superRefineFns: string[]` —

- `_transformFn: string` — 
- `_version: "v3" | "v4"` —

### FunctionBuilder

FunctionBuilder: represents z.function()
Supports function signature validation with args and returns

```ts
constructor(version: "v3" | "v4", params: { input?: Builder<ZodType<unknown, unknown, $ZodTypeInternals<unknown, unknown>>, "string" | "number" | "bigint" | "boolean" | "symbol" | "undefined" | "object" | "function" | "array" | "null" | "any" | "default" | "enum" | "map" | "nullable" | "int" | "void" | "never" | "unknown" | "date" | "record" | "file" | "tuple" | "union" | "intersection" | "set" | "literal" | "optional" | "nonoptional" | "success" | "transform" | "prefault" | "catch" | "nan" | "pipe" | "readonly" | "template_literal" | "promise" | "lazy" | "custom">[]; output?: Builder<ZodType<unknown, unknown, $ZodTypeInternals<unknown, unknown>>, "string" | "number" | "bigint" | "boolean" | "symbol" | "undefined" | "object" | "function" | "array" | "null" | "any" | "default" | "enum" | "map" | "nullable" | "int" | "void" | "never" | "unknown" | "date" | "record" | "file" | "tuple" | "union" | "intersection" | "set" | "literal" | "optional" | "nonoptional" | "success" | "transform" | "prefault" | "catch" | "nan" | "pipe" | "readonly" | "template_literal" | "promise" | "lazy" | "custom"> }): FunctionBuilder
```

**Properties:**
- `typeKind: "function"` — Parser type discriminator (e.g. `'string'`, `'object'`, `'anyOf'`).
Set by the parser that creates this builder.
- `_params: [params?: { input: { _zod: { version: { major: 4; minor: 3; patch: number }; def: { type: "string" | "number" | "bigint" | "boolean" | "symbol" | "undefined" | "object" | "function" | "array" | "null" | "any" | "default" | "enum" | "map" | "nullable" | "int" | "void" | "never" | "unknown" | "date" | "record" | "file" | "tuple" | "union" | "intersection" | "set" | "literal" | "optional" | "nonoptional" | "success" | "transform" | "prefault" | "catch" | "nan" | "pipe" | "readonly" | "template_literal" | "promise" | "lazy" | "custom"; error?: (args: [issue: never]) => string | { message: ... } | null | undefined; checks?: { _zod: { def: ...; issc?: ...; check: any; onattach: ... } }[] }; run: any; parse: any; toJSONSchema?: (args: []) => unknown }; ~standard: { validate: (args: [value: unknown, options?: { libraryOptions?: (...) | (...) }]) => { issues: { message: ...; path?: ... }[] } | { value: unknown[]; issues?: undefined } | { then: any; catch: any; finally: any; [toStringTag]: string }; version: 1; vendor: string; types?: { input: unknown[]; output: unknown[] } } }; output: { _zod: { version: { major: 4; minor: 3; patch: number }; def: { type: "string" | "number" | "bigint" | "boolean" | "symbol" | "undefined" | "object" | "function" | "array" | "null" | "any" | "default" | "enum" | "map" | "nullable" | "int" | "void" | "never" | "unknown" | "date" | "record" | "file" | "tuple" | "union" | "intersection" | "set" | "literal" | "optional" | "nonoptional" | "success" | "transform" | "prefault" | "catch" | "nan" | "pipe" | "readonly" | "template_literal" | "promise" | "lazy" | "custom"; error?: (args: [issue: never]) => string | { message: ... } | null | undefined; checks?: { _zod: { def: ...; issc?: ...; check: any; onattach: ... } }[] }; run: any; parse: any; toJSONSchema?: (args: []) => unknown }; ~standard: { validate: (args: [value: unknown, options?: { libraryOptions?: (...) | (...) }]) => { issues: { message: ...; path?: ... }[] } | { value: unknown; issues?: undefined } | { then: any; catch: any; finally: any; [toStringTag]: string }; version: 1; vendor: string; types?: { input: unknown; output: unknown } } } }]` — 
- `_optional: boolean` — 
- `_nullable: boolean` — 
- `_readonly: boolean` — 
- `_defaultValue: unknown` — 
- `_describeText: string` — 
- `_brandText: string` — 
- `_fallbackText: unknown` — 
- `_refineFn: string` — 
- `_refineMessage: string` — 
- `_superRefineFns: string[]` — 
- `_metaData: Record<string, unknown>` — 
- `_transformFn: string` — 
- `_version: "v3" | "v4"` — 

**Methods:**
- `args(input: Builder<ZodType<unknown, unknown, $ZodTypeInternals<unknown, unknown>>, "string" | "number" | "bigint" | "boolean" | "symbol" | "undefined" | "object" | "function" | "array" | "null" | "any" | "default" | "enum" | "map" | "nullable" | "int" | "void" | "never" | "unknown" | "date" | "record" | "file" | "tuple" | "union" | "intersection" | "set" | "literal" | "optional" | "nonoptional" | "success" | "transform" | "prefault" | "catch" | "nan" | "pipe" | "readonly" | "template_literal" | "promise" | "lazy" | "custom">[]): FunctionBuilder` — Specify function arguments as an array of schemas
- `returns(output: Builder): FunctionBuilder` — Specify function return type schema
- `base(): string` — Compute the type-specific base schema string.

This is the core abstract method in the template method pattern.
Subclasses must implement this to provide their type-specific schema string
(e.g., "z.string()", "z.number()", "z.object({...})").

The base schema string returned by this method will then have shared modifiers
applied via the `modify()` method when `text()` is called.
- `isV4(): boolean` — Check if targeting Zod v4.
- `isV3(): boolean` — Check if targeting Zod v3.
- `serializeParams(): string` — Serialize params to a string representation for code generation.
Handles objects, strings, primitives, and undefined.
- `optional(): this` — Apply optional constraint.
- `required(): this` — 
- `nullable(): this` — Apply nullable constraint.
- `default(value: unknown): this` — Apply default value.
- `describe(description: string): this` — Apply describe modifier.
- `brand(brand: string): this` — Apply brand modifier.
- `readonly(): this` — Apply readonly modifier.
- `catch(fallback: unknown): this` — Apply catch modifier.
- `refine(refineFn: string, message?: string): this` — Apply refine modifier.

Note: function is provided as raw code string e.g. `(val) => val > 0`.
- `superRefine(superRefineFn: string): this` — Apply superRefine modifier.

Note: function is provided as raw code string e.g. `(val, ctx) => { ... }`.
- `meta(metadata: Record<string, unknown>): this` — Apply meta modifier.
- `transform(transformFn: string): this` — Apply transform modifier.

Note: function is provided as raw code string e.g. `(val) => transformedVal`.
- `is<K>(type: K): this is TypeKindOf<K>` — 
- `modify(baseText: string): string` — Apply all shared modifiers to the base schema string.
This method is called by text() and applies modifiers in a stable order.
- `text(): string` — Unwrap and return the final Zod code string.
This orchestrates the template method pattern: text() = modify(base())
- `toString(): string` — Returns a string representation of an object.

### CodecBuilder

CodecBuilder: represents z.codec(inSchema, outSchema)
Enables bidirectional data transformations

```ts
constructor<In, Out>(version: "v3" | "v4", inSchema: BuilderFor<In>, outSchema: BuilderFor<Out>): CodecBuilder<In, Out>
```

**Properties:**
- `typeKind: "pipe"` — Parser type discriminator (e.g. `'string'`, `'object'`, `'anyOf'`).
Set by the parser that creates this builder.
- `_params: [inSchema: BuilderFor<In>, outSchema: BuilderFor<Out>]` — 
- `_optional: boolean` — 
- `_nullable: boolean` — 
- `_readonly: boolean` — 
- `_defaultValue: unknown` — 
- `_describeText: string` — 
- `_brandText: string` — 
- `_fallbackText: unknown` — 
- `_refineFn: string` — 
- `_refineMessage: string` — 
- `_superRefineFns: string[]` — 
- `_metaData: Record<string, unknown>` — 
- `_transformFn: string` — 
- `_version: "v3" | "v4"` — 

**Methods:**
- `base(): string` — Compute the type-specific base schema string.

This is the core abstract method in the template method pattern.
Subclasses must implement this to provide their type-specific schema string
(e.g., "z.string()", "z.number()", "z.object({...})").

The base schema string returned by this method will then have shared modifiers
applied via the `modify()` method when `text()` is called.
- `isV4(): boolean` — Check if targeting Zod v4.
- `isV3(): boolean` — Check if targeting Zod v3.
- `serializeParams(): string` — Serialize params to a string representation for code generation.
Handles objects, strings, primitives, and undefined.
- `optional(): this` — Apply optional constraint.
- `required(): this` — 
- `nullable(): this` — Apply nullable constraint.
- `default(value: unknown): this` — Apply default value.
- `describe(description: string): this` — Apply describe modifier.
- `brand(brand: string): this` — Apply brand modifier.
- `readonly(): this` — Apply readonly modifier.
- `catch(fallback: unknown): this` — Apply catch modifier.
- `refine(refineFn: string, message?: string): this` — Apply refine modifier.

Note: function is provided as raw code string e.g. `(val) => val > 0`.
- `superRefine(superRefineFn: string): this` — Apply superRefine modifier.

Note: function is provided as raw code string e.g. `(val, ctx) => { ... }`.
- `meta(metadata: Record<string, unknown>): this` — Apply meta modifier.
- `transform(transformFn: string): this` — Apply transform modifier.

Note: function is provided as raw code string e.g. `(val) => transformedVal`.
- `is<K>(type: K): this is TypeKindOf<K>` — 
- `modify(baseText: string): string` — Apply all shared modifiers to the base schema string.
This method is called by text() and applies modifiers in a stable order.
- `text(): string` — Unwrap and return the final Zod code string.
This orchestrates the template method pattern: text() = modify(base())
- `toString(): string` — Returns a string representation of an object.

### PreprocessBuilder

PreprocessBuilder: represents z.preprocess(transformFn, schema)
Transforms data before validation

```ts
constructor(version: "v3" | "v4", transformFn: string, schema: Builder): PreprocessBuilder
```

**Properties:**
- `typeKind: "pipe"` — Parser type discriminator (e.g. `'string'`, `'object'`, `'anyOf'`).
Set by the parser that creates this builder.
- `_params: [transformFn: string, schema: Builder<ZodType<unknown, unknown, $ZodTypeInternals<unknown, unknown>>, "string" | "number" | "bigint" | "boolean" | "symbol" | "undefined" | "object" | "function" | "array" | "null" | "any" | "default" | "enum" | "map" | "nullable" | "int" | "void" | "never" | "unknown" | "date" | "record" | "file" | "tuple" | "union" | "intersection" | "set" | "literal" | "optional" | "nonoptional" | "success" | "transform" | "prefault" | "catch" | "nan" | "pipe" | "readonly" | "template_literal" | "promise" | "lazy" | "custom">]` — 
- `_optional: boolean` — 
- `_nullable: boolean` — 
- `_readonly: boolean` — 
- `_defaultValue: unknown` — 
- `_describeText: string` — 
- `_brandText: string` — 
- `_fallbackText: unknown` — 
- `_refineFn: string` — 
- `_refineMessage: string` — 
- `_superRefineFns: string[]` — 
- `_metaData: Record<string, unknown>` — 
- `_transformFn: string` — 
- `_version: "v3" | "v4"` — 

**Methods:**
- `base(): string` — Compute the type-specific base schema string.

This is the core abstract method in the template method pattern.
Subclasses must implement this to provide their type-specific schema string
(e.g., "z.string()", "z.number()", "z.object({...})").

The base schema string returned by this method will then have shared modifiers
applied via the `modify()` method when `text()` is called.
- `isV4(): boolean` — Check if targeting Zod v4.
- `isV3(): boolean` — Check if targeting Zod v3.
- `serializeParams(): string` — Serialize params to a string representation for code generation.
Handles objects, strings, primitives, and undefined.
- `optional(): this` — Apply optional constraint.
- `required(): this` — 
- `nullable(): this` — Apply nullable constraint.
- `default(value: unknown): this` — Apply default value.
- `describe(description: string): this` — Apply describe modifier.
- `brand(brand: string): this` — Apply brand modifier.
- `readonly(): this` — Apply readonly modifier.
- `catch(fallback: unknown): this` — Apply catch modifier.
- `refine(refineFn: string, message?: string): this` — Apply refine modifier.

Note: function is provided as raw code string e.g. `(val) => val > 0`.
- `superRefine(superRefineFn: string): this` — Apply superRefine modifier.

Note: function is provided as raw code string e.g. `(val, ctx) => { ... }`.
- `meta(metadata: Record<string, unknown>): this` — Apply meta modifier.
- `transform(transformFn: string): this` — Apply transform modifier.

Note: function is provided as raw code string e.g. `(val) => transformedVal`.
- `is<K>(type: K): this is TypeKindOf<K>` — 
- `modify(baseText: string): string` — Apply all shared modifiers to the base schema string.
This method is called by text() and applies modifiers in a stable order.
- `text(): string` — Unwrap and return the final Zod code string.
This orchestrates the template method pattern: text() = modify(base())
- `toString(): string` — Returns a string representation of an object.

### PipeBuilder

PipeBuilder: represents schema.pipe(targetSchema)
This is implemented as a modifier on the base schema rather than a standalone builder
since pipe is called on an existing schema

```ts
constructor(version: "v3" | "v4", sourceSchema: Builder, targetSchema: Builder): PipeBuilder
```

**Properties:**
- `typeKind: "pipe"` — Parser type discriminator (e.g. `'string'`, `'object'`, `'anyOf'`).
Set by the parser that creates this builder.
- `_params: [sourceSchema: Builder<ZodType<unknown, unknown, $ZodTypeInternals<unknown, unknown>>, "string" | "number" | "bigint" | "boolean" | "symbol" | "undefined" | "object" | "function" | "array" | "null" | "any" | "default" | "enum" | "map" | "nullable" | "int" | "void" | "never" | "unknown" | "date" | "record" | "file" | "tuple" | "union" | "intersection" | "set" | "literal" | "optional" | "nonoptional" | "success" | "transform" | "prefault" | "catch" | "nan" | "pipe" | "readonly" | "template_literal" | "promise" | "lazy" | "custom">, targetSchema: Builder<ZodType<unknown, unknown, $ZodTypeInternals<unknown, unknown>>, "string" | "number" | "bigint" | "boolean" | "symbol" | "undefined" | "object" | "function" | "array" | "null" | "any" | "default" | "enum" | "map" | "nullable" | "int" | "void" | "never" | "unknown" | "date" | "record" | "file" | "tuple" | "union" | "intersection" | "set" | "literal" | "optional" | "nonoptional" | "success" | "transform" | "prefault" | "catch" | "nan" | "pipe" | "readonly" | "template_literal" | "promise" | "lazy" | "custom">]` — 
- `_optional: boolean` — 
- `_nullable: boolean` — 
- `_readonly: boolean` — 
- `_defaultValue: unknown` — 
- `_describeText: string` — 
- `_brandText: string` — 
- `_fallbackText: unknown` — 
- `_refineFn: string` — 
- `_refineMessage: string` — 
- `_superRefineFns: string[]` — 
- `_metaData: Record<string, unknown>` — 
- `_transformFn: string` — 
- `_version: "v3" | "v4"` — 

**Methods:**
- `base(): string` — Compute the type-specific base schema string.

This is the core abstract method in the template method pattern.
Subclasses must implement this to provide their type-specific schema string
(e.g., "z.string()", "z.number()", "z.object({...})").

The base schema string returned by this method will then have shared modifiers
applied via the `modify()` method when `text()` is called.
- `isV4(): boolean` — Check if targeting Zod v4.
- `isV3(): boolean` — Check if targeting Zod v3.
- `serializeParams(): string` — Serialize params to a string representation for code generation.
Handles objects, strings, primitives, and undefined.
- `optional(): this` — Apply optional constraint.
- `required(): this` — 
- `nullable(): this` — Apply nullable constraint.
- `default(value: unknown): this` — Apply default value.
- `describe(description: string): this` — Apply describe modifier.
- `brand(brand: string): this` — Apply brand modifier.
- `readonly(): this` — Apply readonly modifier.
- `catch(fallback: unknown): this` — Apply catch modifier.
- `refine(refineFn: string, message?: string): this` — Apply refine modifier.

Note: function is provided as raw code string e.g. `(val) => val > 0`.
- `superRefine(superRefineFn: string): this` — Apply superRefine modifier.

Note: function is provided as raw code string e.g. `(val, ctx) => { ... }`.
- `meta(metadata: Record<string, unknown>): this` — Apply meta modifier.
- `transform(transformFn: string): this` — Apply transform modifier.

Note: function is provided as raw code string e.g. `(val) => transformedVal`.
- `is<K>(type: K): this is TypeKindOf<K>` — 
- `modify(baseText: string): string` — Apply all shared modifiers to the base schema string.
This method is called by text() and applies modifiers in a stable order.
- `text(): string` — Unwrap and return the final Zod code string.
This orchestrates the template method pattern: text() = modify(base())
- `toString(): string` — Returns a string representation of an object.

### JsonBuilder

JsonBuilder: represents z.json()
Validates JSON-encoded strings

```ts
constructor(version?: "v3" | "v4", params?: string | { abort?: boolean; when?: (payload: ParsePayload) => boolean; path?: PropertyKey[]; params?: Record<string, any>; error?: string | $ZodErrorMap<NonNullable<$ZodIssue>>; message?: string }): JsonBuilder
```

**Properties:**
- `typeKind: "lazy"` — Parser type discriminator (e.g. `'string'`, `'object'`, `'anyOf'`).
Set by the parser that creates this builder.
- `_params: unknown[] | [] | [params?: string | { error?: string | ((args: [issue: { input: unknown; code: "invalid_type"; expected: "string" | "number" | "bigint" | "boolean" | "symbol" | "undefined" | "object" | "function" | "array" | "null" | "map" | "int" | "void" | "never" | "date" | "record" | "file" | "tuple" | "set" | "nonoptional" | "nan" | { toString: any; error?: (args: [issue: never]) => string | { message: string } | null | undefined; checks?: { _zod: { def: { check: string; error?: (...) | (...); abort?: (...) | (...) | (...); when?: (...) | (...) }; issc?: { code?: ...; input?: ...; path: ...; message: ... }; check: any; onattach: ((args: ...) => ...)[] } }[] }; run: any; parse: any; toJSONSchema?: (args: []) => unknown } }] | [valueType: { _zod: { version: { major: 4; ~standard: ... } | { _zod: ... }; continue?: boolean; [key: string]: unknown } | { maximum: number | bigint; input: unknown; code: "too_big"; origin: "string" | "number" | "bigint" | "array" | "int" | "date" | "file" | "set" | { toString: any; trimLeft: any; trimRight: any; matchAll: any; replaceAll: any; at: any; isWellFormed: any; toWellFormed: any; [iterator]: any; [key: ...]: ... }; inclusive?: boolean; exact?: boolean; path?: (...)[]; message?: string; inst?: { _zod: ...; ~standard: ... } | { _zod: ... }; continue?: boolean; [key: string]: unknown } | { minimum: number | bigint; input: unknown; code: "too_small"; origin: "string" | "number" | "bigint" | "array" | "int" | "date" | "file" | "set" | { toString: any; charAt: any; charCodeAt: any; concat: any; indexOf: any; lastIndexOf: any; localeCompare: any; match: any; replace: any; search: any; slice: any; split: any; substring: any; toLowerCase: any; toLocaleLowerCase: any; big: any; blink: any; bold: any; fixed: any; fontcolor: any; fontsize: any; italics: any; link: any; small: any; strike: any; sub: any; sup: any; padStart: any; padEnd: any; trimEnd: any; trimStart: any; trimLeft: any; trimRight: any; matchAll: any; replaceAll: any; at: any; isWellFormed: any; toWellFormed: any; [iterator]: any; [key: ...]: ... }; inclusive?: boolean; exact?: boolean; path?: (...)[]; lastIndexOf: any; localeCompare: any; match: any; replace: any; search: any; slice: any; split: any; substring: any; toLowerCase: any; toLocaleLowerCase: any; toUpperCase: any; toLocaleUpperCase: any; fontcolor: any; fontsize: any; italics: any; link: any; small: any; strike: any; sub: any; sup: any; padStart: any; padEnd: any; trimEnd: any; trimStart: any; trimLeft: any; trimRight: any; matchAll: any; message?: string; inst?: { _zod: ...; ~standard: ... } | { _zod: ... }; continue?: boolean; [key: string]: unknown } | { input: number | bigint | undefined; code: "not_multiple_of"; divisor: number; path?: (...)[]; message?: string; inst?: { _zod: ...; ~standard: ... } | { _zod: ... }; continue?: boolean; [key: string]: unknown } | { keys: string[]; input: { [key: ...]: ... } | undefined; code: "unrecognized_keys";
